title: Old idea: weekly planning by urgency
content: A past note suggested ranking weekly tasks mostly by urgency and deadline pressure. It treated new ideas and old commitments the same.

title: Recent update: planning should weight freshness
content: A newer reflection updates the planning idea. Fresh notes, recent contradictions, and newly edited thoughts should have stronger influence than stale urgency-only rules.

title: Neutral note: reading list
content: Books to read about databases, search systems, and note-taking habits. This note is useful context but does not revise the planning idea.
